The '''New Osler Flejj Beasts''' were a professional [[Pugil]] team on the planet [[Lannik/Legends|Lannik]]. In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], its members included [[Rolsat Noviee]] and [[Kova Naan]]. Rolsat, nicknamed "Rolstone", was the highest-scoring and highest-paid Pugil player in Lannik history, and was later revealed to be a [[Clawdite/Legends|Clawdite]] changeling disguised as a [[Lannik (species)/Legends|Lannik]].

==Appearances==
